info.title: DataSphere Innovation IA Platform
info.description: Cabinet de conseil augmenté par IA — DataSphere Innovation

post.description: Create the first admin user only when the users table is empty.

Authenticate user. Returns access_token (60 min) + refresh_token (30 days).
Rate-limited to 10 attempts/minute per IP in production.

Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Called automatically by the frontend before the access token expires.

Request a password reset link. Always returns 200 to avoid email enumeration.
Sends an email with a reset link valid for 60 minutes.
Validate reset token and set new password.
Change password for authenticated user (requires current password).

Receive a contact form submission from the DataSphere website.
Sends a notification email to the team (if SMTP configured).
Always returns 200 to avoid leaking info — errors are logged server-side.

schema.title: Response Submit Contact Api V1 Contact Post

get.description: List all team members. Any authenticated user can see the team.

schema.title: Response List Team Members Api V1 Team Get

get.description: Return available roles (authenticated users only).

post.description: Invite a new team member (admin only).

patch.description: Update role or activation status (admin only).

post.description: Deactivate a team member (admin only). Does not delete data.
Change your own password (self-service, no admin required).
Change a user's password (admin only, or self via /team/me/change-password).

schema.title: Response Read Organizations Api V1 Organizations Get

get.description: List contacts. Filter by organization and/or search term.

schema.title: Response Read Contacts Api V1 Contacts Get
Response Read Opportunities Api V1 Opportunities Get

patch.description: Move an opportunity to a new pipeline status (kanban card move).

get.description:
Return all opportunities grouped by pipeline status for the kanban board.
Each column includes the opportunity list + aggregate value.

schema.title: Response Read Tenders Api V1 Tenders Get
Response Read Requirements Api V1 Tenders  Tender Id  Requirements Get
Response Read Go No Go Criteria Api V1 Tender Governance Tenders  Tender Id  Go No Go Get
Response Read Compliance Items Api V1 Tender Governance Tenders  Tender Id  Compliance Get

get.description:
Generate an AI-powered Go/No-Go recommendation from criteria, tender and
opportunity context. Falls back to rule-based analysis if no LLM is configured.

schema.title: Response Apply Go No Go Template Api V1 Tender Templates Tenders  Tender Id  Go No Go Default Post
Response Build Compliance From Requirements Api V1 Tender Templates Tenders  Tender Id  Compliance From Requirements Post

get.description: Discover normalized tender candidates from configured watch sources.

schema.title: Response Search Tender Watch Api V1 Tender Watch Search Get
Response Read Agents Api V1 Agents Get
Response Preview Default Agents Api V1 Agents Defaults Get
Response Install Default Agents Api V1 Agents Defaults Install Post
Response Read Assignments Api V1 Agents Assignments List Get
Response Read Actions Api V1 Agents Actions List Get
Response Plan Assignment Actions Api V1 Agents Actions Plan Post
Response Read Agent Actions Api V1 Agent Actions Get

get.description: Return all actions that require human approval and have not been approved yet.

schema.title: Response Read Pending Approvals Api V1 Agent Actions Pending Approvals Get

post.description:
Idempotent planning: create only missing action types, then return ALL
actions for the assignment (new + pre-existing).

schema.title: Response Plan Agent Actions Api V1 Agent Actions Plan Post
Response Read Deliverables Api V1 Deliverables Get
Response Read Sections Api V1 Deliverables  Deliverable Id  Sections Get
Response Read Contributions Api V1 Deliverables  Deliverable Id  Contributions Get

get.description: List all saved versions for a deliverable.

schema.title: Response List Deliverable Versions Api V1 Deliverables  Deliverable Id  Versions Get

post.description: Manually save a snapshot of the current deliverable state.

get.description:
Diff version_number against compare_to (defaults to version_number + 1).
Returns added/removed/unchanged line counts + line-level diff.

post.description: Restore a deliverable to a previous version (creates a new version, resets to draft).

get.description: Return scheduler running state, job list and pending approvals count.

post.description: Pause all scheduled jobs.
Resume all scheduled jobs.
Trigger a specific job immediately.

get.description: Return recent scheduler execution logs.

schema.title: Response Get Scheduler Logs Api V1 Scheduler Logs Get

get.description:
Return comprehensive pipeline KPIs in a single call:
opportunities, tenders, agents, deliverables, scheduler stats + notifications.

Return assignments + their actions for Gantt timeline visualization.
Each assignment is a row; each action is a bar with start/end dates.

Comprehensive dashboard KPIs — all metrics in one call.
Covers CRM, AO, deliverables, agents, suggestions, team.

Métriques de performance et statistiques d'utilisation de la plateforme.
Utile pour la page de monitoring et les rapports SaaS.

Return audit logs with filters.
Supports: resource_type, resource_id, action, user (partial), date range, pagination.

schema.title: Response Read Audit Logs Api V1 Audit Logs Get

get.description: Return total count of matching audit log entries.

schema.title: Response Count Logs Api V1 Audit Logs Count Get

get.description: Export audit logs as CSV (max 2000 rows).
Download deliverable content as a Markdown file.

Return a print-ready HTML page for the deliverable.
Open in browser → Ctrl+P → Save as PDF.

Generate a client-ready email preview for a deliverable.
Returns subject, HTML body and plain text body — no SMTP required.

post.description:
Send an approved deliverable by email (real SMTP if configured, preview-only otherwise).
Returns {'sent': bool, 'provider': str, 'message': str}.

get.description:
Generate a complete professional mission report for a tender.
Aggregates: context, requirements, compliance, agent actions, approved deliverables.
Print-ready HTML → browser Save as PDF.
Download pipeline commercial as .xlsx
Download all tenders + Go/No-Go scores as .xlsx
Download agent actions report as .xlsx
Download deliverables status report as .xlsx
Download complete multi-sheet report as .xlsx
Export all contacts as CSV.
Export all opportunities as CSV.

post.description: Install all built-in sector templates (idempotent).

schema.title: Response Install Templates Api V1 Sector Templates Install Post

get.description: List sector templates with optional filters.

schema.title: Response List Templates Api V1 Sector Templates Get

get.description: Return the list of available sectors.

post.description:
Create a new deliverable from a sector template.
The template content replaces the generic default content.

get.description:
Search across all entities. Returns grouped results by entity type.
q: search term (min 2 chars)
limit: max results per category (default 10, max 50)

Return a unified activity feed for the last N days.
Combines audit_logs + scheduler_logs + deliverable events.
Get notifications for the current user (broadcast + user-specific).

schema.title: Response Get Notifications Api V1 Notifications Get

post.description: Create a broadcast notification (admin use).

get.description: Get unread notification count — optimized for polling.

post.description: Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read for current user.

get.description:
Open an SSE connection to receive real-time notifications.
The client should use EventSource('/api/v1/notifications/stream').
Reconnects are handled automatically by the browser.
Return number of active SSE connections (for health monitor).

schema.title: Response Stream Status Api V1 Notifications Stream Status Get

get.description: Return count of pending suggestions per entity type.

schema.title: Response Get Pending Count Api V1 Suggestions Count Get

get.description: Return all pending suggestions grouped by entity type.

schema.title: Response List Pending Api V1 Suggestions Pending Get

post.description:
Approve or reject a batch of suggestions.
Validated entities become visible in normal CRM views.

schema.title: Response Batch Validate Api V1 Suggestions Validate Post

post.description:
Manually trigger a BOAMP scan.
Runs synchronously — may take 10–60s depending on LLM latency.

schema.title: Response Trigger Boamp Scan Api V1 Suggestions Scan Boamp Post

post.description:
Create a pending suggestion from pasted text
(AO description, email, web page content…).
LLM extracts structured fields automatically.

schema.title: Response Import From Text Api V1 Suggestions Import Text Post

get.description: Return detailed health status of all platform components.

Return all LLM providers sorted by cost (free → near-free → budget → standard → premium).
Shows which providers are configured (API key set) and their active model.

schema.title: Response Get Providers Api V1 Providers Get

get.description: Return only configured providers in active priority order.

schema.title: Response Get Active Providers Api V1 Providers Active Get

get.description:
Return provider recommendations.

Without task_type: full strategy (priority order, tier breakdown, tips).
With task_type: recommendation for a specific task (best providers, cost hint).

Available task types:
- context_analysis
- go_no_go_recommendation
- tender_requirements_review
- deliverable_plan
- compliance_matrix
- commercial_proposal
- sector_analysis

schema.title: Response Get Provider Recommendations Api V1 Providers Recommendations Get

post.description: Upload a file (PDF, DOCX, etc.) to an appel d'offres.

schema.title: Response List Tender Files Api V1 Uploads Tenders  Tender Id  Get

post.description: Upload a file (PDF, DOCX, etc.) to a livrable.

schema.title: Response List Deliverable Files Api V1 Uploads Deliverables  Deliverable Id  Get

get.description: Download a specific file by ID.

delete.description: Delete a file. Admins can delete any file; others only their own uploads.

schema.title: Response Delete File Api V1 Uploads  File Id  Delete

get.description: List workspaces accessible to the current user.

schema.title: Response List Workspaces Api V1 Workspaces Get

post.description: Create a new workspace. Creator becomes owner.

schema.title: Response List Members Api V1 Workspaces  Workspace Id  Members Get
Response Remove Member Api V1 Workspaces  Workspace Id  Members  User Id  Delete

get.description: Return workspace plan details and current usage vs limits.
